description_long: This apartment building is a mid-rise, rectangular structure surrounded by lush landscaping and greenery, including hedges and trees. The building features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines, flat roofs, and a neutral color palette. It is set within a fenced plot, with paved walkways, a driveway, and adjacent structures that may serve as garages or auxiliary buildings. The main building has multiple floors, each with regularly spaced windows and balconies, providing outdoor space for residents. The grounds are well-maintained, with garden beds and outdoor lighting enhancing the residential ambiance. The overall setting suggests a private, upscale apartment complex in an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A modern, multi-story apartment building with balconies, surrounded by landscaped gardens and auxiliary structures within a fenced plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central building with balconies, and landscaped gardens.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, adjacent auxiliary structure, and dense perimeter hedges.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the building, auxiliary structures, and extensive greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the auxiliary building, garden pathways, and the main building's side façade.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in horizontal rows on each floor, evenly spaced and aligned vertically, with some grouped near balconies.
